experience.sectionSubtitle: My professional journey building intelligent software solutions

items.description: Development of full-stack software modules using Node.js and Next.js, integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) for automation and system-driven insights. Design of embedding pipelines and vector database workflows to support Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems, along with continuous optimization to improve performance, scalability, and efficiency.
highlights: Architecting advanced RAG and Embeddings pipelines for intelligent data processing
Leveraging LLMs to extract valuable insights and automate complex workflows
End-to-end development — from backend logic to seamless user experiences

featuredProjects.sectionSubtitle: Showcasing impactful projects that push the boundaries of AI and full-stack development

items.title: TourlyAI — AI-Powered Tourism Analytics
items.desc: Open-source desktop app that turns tourism reviews into strategic insights — 100% locally, no cloud needed. My capstone project at UG: 2 fine-tuned BERT models, a 9-phase NLP pipeline, 34+ chart types, and a full Electron + React + Python app with bilingual support.
highlights: 19 Jupyter notebooks exploring sentiment analysis, topic modeling, and multi-label classification
Custom multi-label classifier predicting 12 tourism categories + a subjectivity classifier for mixed reviews
Full NLP pipeline: preprocessing → sentiment → subjectivity → categories → BERTopic → LLM summarization → strategic insights
Desktop app with interactive dashboards, review explorer, PDF reports, and optional LLM via Ollama or OpenAI

aboutMe.p1: Hello! I'm <highlight>Víctor Ángel López Romero</highlight>, a 22-year-old AI Software Engineer from Guanajuato, México. My fascination with Artificial Intelligence started during university when I was amazed by how AI could perform seemingly complex tasks. After deep research, I discovered that AI is actually a beautiful combination of <highlight>pure mathematics, algorithms, logical reasoning, and immense computing power</highlight>.
aboutMe.p2: This revelation fascinated me because I found a field where I could apply all my mathematical knowledge and unlock its true potential. By combining Artificial Intelligence with modern web development — with <highlight>JavaScript being my gateway into programming</highlight> — I now focus on creating <highlight>intelligent applications that enhance productivity</highlight> and help people save valuable time.
